name: project_context_build
description: Build complete project context including metadata, tasks, files, and recent activity
description_for_agent: Get comprehensive project context in a single call. Returns project info, task statistics, file tree, and recent activity logs. Parameters: project_slug (string), include_logs (boolean, default: true), include_file_tree (boolean, default: true), max_recent_logs (integer, default: 50). Use this when starting work on a project to understand its current state, goals, and recent activity.

max_recent_logs.description: Maximum number of recent log entries (default: 50)
